examples: What can you see except a Hoodie?
He fumbles in his hoodie pockets and finds his BlackBerry.
Housed in a former bomb shelter and painted black, it's packed with the hoodie-and-skullcap set.
In contrast Flint and Tinder offer a ten year guarantee on their latest hoodie.
"The fact I wear a hoodie doesn't justify you killing me, " he told Burnett.
